'''Chris Cox''' has provided voices for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.

==Works==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' – [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' – [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], Imperial Officer 2, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Wedge Antilles, Wingman 5
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' – Alliance Infantry, CIS Infantry, CIS Officer, Gungan Infantry
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' – [[Gelesi]], Checkpoint Guard, [[Lootra]], [[Mandalorian]] Sentry, [[Peragus Mining Facility Dock Officer]], [[Galactic Republic]] [[Soldier]]<ref name="IMDB">{{IMDb|title/tt0433458|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II - The Sith Lords}}</ref> (Credited as "Additional Voices")
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' – Rebel Trooper, X-Wing Pilot, Additional Voices
*''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' – Additional voices
*[[Star Wars Jedi: Survivor|''Star Wars Jedi: Survivor'']] - Additional voices<ref name="Survivor"> [[Star Wars Jedi: Survivor]]</ref>
